content:
A clash with the same task exists:
https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/1343580db502e42c8a478fdd9c14700f30349a

Please use another idea for your contribution.

Also, please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement , and format and present your statement properly by following the example there.

Thanks.
